$comment: Risk feed registry. RFP §4 list is illustrative; this is our proposed registry. accessibility is our working classification — entries marked verified:false are pending first-hand verification (SAT-302).

feeds.name: DeFiScan
feeds.focus: Decentralization maturity framework: who controls keys, upgrades, and admin powers

accessibility.note: Open-source GitHub repo (deficollective/defiscan) with structured per-chain frontmatter; synced via scripts/sync-defiscan.mjs

feeds.name: CuratorWatch
feeds.focus: Vault-level risk monitoring for Morpho curators, tracking allocation risk and curator behavior

accessibility.note: Public dashboard; API availability to verify

feeds.name: BlockAnalitica
feeds.focus: Quantitative on-chain risk dashboards for lending markets: liquidations, collateral health, market exposure

accessibility.note: Public per-market dashboards; API availability to verify

feeds.name: DeFiPunk'd
feeds.focus: Multi-dimension risk registry: Control, Exit, Autonomy, Open Access, Verifiability via distributed LLM consensus

accessibility.note: Registry model suggests open data; endpoint to verify

feeds.name: Pharos
feeds.focus: Real-time risk monitoring and automated alerts for live protocol risk events

accessibility.note: Alert product; public feed availability to verify

feeds.name: DeFi Sphere
feeds.focus: Multi-dimensional protocol analysis covering technical, financial, and operational risk

accessibility.note: Analysis reports; machine-readable access to verify

feeds.name: DeFi Saver
feeds.focus: Live loan health and liquidation statistics for leveraged DeFi positions

accessibility.note: Public position/loan-health stats; API to verify

feeds.name: Credora
feeds.focus: Institutional-grade credit risk ratings for DeFi protocols and borrowers

accessibility.note: Institutional product; expect gated, manual curation with permission

feeds.name: RiskLayer
feeds.focus: Economic security middleware built on EigenLayer. Proof of Risk consensus for decentralized, validator-attested risk scores

accessibility.note: Onchain attestation model implies readable outputs; endpoint to verify

feeds.name: pigi.finance
feeds.focus: Vault analytics and risk-adjusted yield comparison across 50+ protocols. Tracks historical exploits, holder concentration, and risk-adjusted APY

accessibility.note: Public dashboard; API availability to verify

feeds.name: Xerberus
feeds.focus: Independent risk rating protocol for DeFi vaults. 300+ subscores across 85+ mechanisms. Investor-focused and open-source

accessibility.note: Open-source and API-first per their positioning; endpoint to verify

feeds.name: Zyfai Risk
feeds.focus: Real-time risk score dashboard for DeFi liquidity pools. Tracks risk metrics, TVL, APY, and security grades across pools

accessibility.note: Public dashboard; API availability to verify

feeds.name: LlamaRisk
feeds.focus: Protocol risk research and parameter recommendations for DeFi. Analytics and monitoring focused on collateral and governance risk

accessibility.note: Public research reports; structured data to verify

feeds.name: Philidor Analytics
feeds.focus: Deterministic vault risk scoring across 700+ vaults. Three-vector framework: asset quality, platform code maturity, and governance controls. Open methodology

accessibility.note: Open methodology, deterministic outputs; endpoint to verify
